message:
test: pin POSIX 2008 _l locale-aware variants conformance

Adds tests/conformance_diff_locale_l_variants.rs covering 8 functions:
- ctype: isalpha_l/isdigit_l/isspace_l/toupper_l/tolower_l (exhaustive
  0..=255 + EOF, in C locale)
- stdlib: strtol_l (11 cases), strtod_l (12 cases incl inf/nan/garbage)
- locale: newlocale/freelocale (valid + invalid name)

6 tests pass.

Discovered DISC-LOCALE-001: fl::newlocale accepts category_mask with
the LC_ALL bit (1<<6) set; glibc rejects with NULL+EINVAL. Documented
as a known divergence; bd-locl2 opened for the fix.

Beads: bd-locl1 (harness), bd-locl2 (newlocale mask validation)
